reason: Verified agent can use GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with Super Agent application and sidebar showing multiple agents
Clicked on "QA-20260401-001802-2did" agent in the sidebar - Agent detail page opened successfully
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status correctly displayed as "idle" in the agent header
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message was typed and sent successfully, agent transitioned to "working" state
Waited for response and checked for account access request - Agent attempted multiple local methods (gh CLI, git config, environment variables) and then requested GitHub account access
Selected GitHub account checkbox in the access request card - Checkbox was successfully checked, enabling the Grant Access button
Clicked "Grant Access (1)" button - Access was granted and agent returned to "working" state
Waited for API request review and clicked "Allow" - API request to GET /user endpoint was allowed, agent continued processing
Waited for final response - Agent completed execution in 1m 27s and provided clear response
Verified response includes GitHub username - Response clearly states "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Took final screenshot - Screenshot captured showing complete conversation with GitHub username result
